audit_items.proof_trace: The staleness guard at L162 (`if (report.observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold) revert StaleFeedData()`) is applied inside the loop that processes every verified report, before any write to `s_dataStreamsPrice`. A zero `stalenessThreshold` is prevented by `_applyFeedInfoUpdates:244`, so the denominator is always positive. The check correctly enforces the assertion on all reachable paths.
